actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

official_title: To prohibit Federal agencies from taking any adverse action against a person solely because the person provides business assistance to a cannabis-related legitimate business, to amend the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 to create a safe harbor for national securities exchanges to list the securities of issuers that are cannabis-related legitimate businesses, and for other purposes.
short_title: Capital Lending and Investment for Marijuana Businesses Act

titles.title: Capital Lending and Investment for Marijuana Businesses Act

To prohibit Federal agencies from taking any adverse action against a person solely because the person provides business assistance to a cannabis-related legitimate business, to amend the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 to create a safe harbor for national securities exchanges to list the securities of issuers that are cannabis-related legitimate businesses, and for other purposes.
